gui/501/com.test.fixture1 = {
	active count = 0
	path = /Users/demo/Library/LaunchAgents/com.test.fixture1.plist
	type = LaunchAgent
	state = not running
	disabled on keys = ["com.test.fixture1"]

	program = /usr/bin/yes
	arguments = {
		/usr/bin/yes
	}

	stdout path = /tmp/yesfix.log
	stderr path = /tmp/yesfix.log

	domain = gui/501 [100023]
	asid = 100023
	minimum runtime = 10
	exit timeout = 5
	runs = 0
	last exit reason = 0

	spawn type = interactive (4)
	jetsam priority = 40
	cpumon = default
	job state = not running

	properties = keepalive | inferred program
}
